summary: D15: deploy/backup.sh — nightly pg_dump | gzip | b2 upload from §7.7, install via vps-bootstrap to /etc/cron.daily/guru-backup

resolution.note: deploy/backup.sh streams pg_dump -Fc → gzip → b2 upload to a B2 bucket. Pruning delegated to B2 lifecycle rules (set 'keep prior versions 30 days' in bucket settings). Bootstrap installs b2 CLI via pipx and the script as /etc/cron.daily/guru-backup. Config at /etc/backup-b2.env (B2_ACCOUNT_ID, B2_APPLICATION_KEY, B2_BUCKET). Untested end-to-end — needs B2 credentials in place first.
